race.description: Sub-Zero Aircon King Of The Mountain Handicap
race.comment: BATTLEFIELD (3) was given time to settle from an outside draw and wound up strongly for an eye-catching second over 1400m in the rich Gold Jewell at the Gold Coast. Draws low today and has a sharp record at this venue and distance. Top chance. MOONHAVEN (12) led beaten 1L over 1200m at Eagle Farm off two gutsy wins there prior. Presents on a quick back-up and tumbles in weight. That brings him right into it. EXOTIQUE MISS (4) is third up and ready to find her best. She's performed well in tougher races and recorded her best number beaten 2.6L over 1400m in a Group 1. Maps well, and Ben Thompson is a key jockey engagement. MASTER SHOWMAN (7) is going well enough to feature at decent odds. Went close in Open grade at Ipswich last time and his Eagle Farm rating three back also reads well enough. Has weight relief on a 7-day return.
